hero.subtitle: We design and ship web platforms, mobile apps, and internal tools — with clear architecture, fast delivery, and long-term maintainability.

services.title: Capabilities
services.subtitle: Engineering, design, and operations in one team — so you move from idea to production without hand‑offs slowing you down.

items.title: Web development
items.desc: Corporate sites, product dashboards, and complex web apps on React and Next.js — performance, accessibility, and SEO baked in.

items.title: Mobile apps
items.desc: Cross‑platform and native‑quality experiences for iOS and Android using Flutter and React Native.

items.title: UI / UX design
items.desc: Interfaces that are easy to adopt: flows, design systems, and prototypes grounded in real usage.

items.title: CRM & internal tools
items.desc: Custom CRMs and back‑office systems tailored to how your team actually works.

items.title: Automation & integrations
items.desc: Connect services, remove manual steps, and keep data consistent across your stack.

items.title: Support & evolution
items.desc: Ongoing improvements, monitoring, and releases after launch — your product keeps moving.

portfolio.title: Selected projects
portfolio.subtitle: A few engagements where clarity in scope and execution made the difference.

projects.title: Oson Uy
projects.desc: A property rental and sales platform for Tashkent — maps, rich filters, and secure user areas.

projects.title: SaaS dashboard
projects.desc: Logistics analytics: live shipment tracking, alerts, and automated reporting for operations.

projects.title: E‑commerce brand
projects.desc: A high‑performance storefront with custom UX and a content model built for merchandising.

about.title: Engineering first.
about.p1: Sardor System Solutions is a team of engineers and designers focused on dependable products — not slide decks. We care about architecture, observability, and what happens after launch.
about.p2: We align technology with your processes: fewer surprises in delivery, clearer ownership, and systems you can extend for years.

process.title: How we work
process.subtitle: A straightforward path from discovery to production — with visibility at each step.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.desc: We map goals, constraints, and risks — then agree on scope, milestones, and success metrics.

steps.title: Design
steps.desc: UX flows and UI direction that match your brand — validated before we commit to build.

steps.title: Development
steps.desc: Iterative delivery with reviews, tests, and documentation — so the codebase stays understandable.

steps.title: Launch
steps.desc: Release, monitoring, and handover — plus a plan for what to improve next.

contact.title: Tell us about your project
contact.subtitle: We usually reply within one business day. Share context, timeline, and links — we’ll suggest a sensible next step.

footer.tagline: We build reliable digital products for teams that outgrow spreadsheets and off‑the‑shelf tools.
